title: androsace occidentalis var. simplex
intro: Androsace occidentalis var. simplex, also known as Western Rock Jasmine or Western Star of the Andes, is a low-growing, perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Androsace occidentalis var. simplex include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to promote relaxation and soothe digestive issues.
